notes: AKB-19 constraint: ONLY Liam (VCgLBmBjldJmfphyB8sZ) and Alice (Xb7hH8MSUJpSbSDYk0k2) used. No opening overlap — s01 ends at 6.27s, s02 starts at 6.5s (0.23s gap). All clips mix clean with no overlap.

steps.display_text: A Match Pairs slide challenges participants to connect prompts with answers — great for vocabulary, capitals, and more.
steps.tts_text: A Match Pairs slide challenges participants to connect prompts with answers — great for vocabulary, capitals, and more.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to start a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Match Pairs from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.
steps.tts_text: Select Match Pairs from the slide type picker in the Quiz section.

steps.display_text: Type your matching challenge in the question field.
steps.tts_text: Type your matching challenge in the question field.

steps.display_text: Type the first item participants must match — this goes in the left column.
steps.tts_text: Type the first item participants must match — this goes in the left column.

steps.display_text: Now type the matching answer. The right column shuffles automatically on the canvas.
steps.tts_text: Now type the matching answer. The right column shuffles automatically on the canvas.

steps.display_text: That is all it takes. Hit Present when you are ready — participants race to connect every pair before the timer runs out.
steps.tts_text: That is all it takes. Hit Present when you are ready — participants race to connect every pair before the timer runs out.

mix_command: ffmpeg -y -i visual-trimmed.webm -i s01.mp3 -i s02.mp3 -i s03.mp3 -i s04.mp3 -i s05.mp3 -i s06.mp3 -i s07.mp3 -filter_complex '[1:a]adelay=0|0[a1];[2:a]adelay=6500|6500[a2];[3:a]adelay=9500|9500[a3];[4:a]adelay=14000|14000[a4];[5:a]adelay=18500|18500[a5];[6:a]adelay=24000|24000[a6];[7:a]adelay=33000|33000[a7];[a1][a2][a3][a4][a5][a6][a7]amix=inputs=7:normalize=0[aout]' -map 0:v -map '[aout]' -c:v copy -c:a libopus -b:a 64k narrated.webm
